return(function(b,L,p,l,C,x,U,m,W,t,g,O,V,Y,I,R,n,j,q,N,y,v,i)g,j,i,n,t,Y,y,O,v,I,q,N,R,m,W,V=function(b,f)local L=n(f)local p=function(p,l,C,x)return O(b,{p,l;C,x},f,L)end return p O(b,{p;l;C},f,L)end return p end,{},{},1046135+-1046135,function(b,f)local L=n(f)local p=function(p,l)return O(b,{p;l},f,L)end return p end,function(b)local p=function()return O(b,{},f,L)end return p end return(j(-1025786+6761517,{}))(L(U))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or
